category_title: Preschoolers at risk for developmental delays with mild language disorders
scenario_title: Post-play review session with general questioning
minimal_context: The interventionist and the student are sitting in the play area with the toys to discuss what occurred during the preceding play session.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We are going to talk about the play session we just finished. What did you play with today?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks at the toys on the floor and does not answer.)

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Nods slightly but does not initiate any conversation.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Tell me what happened during play time.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Sits quietly and remains completely silent, failing to respond to the general question about the play session.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We are going to talk about the play session we just finished. What did you play with today?

STUDENT: (Looks at the toys on the floor and does not answer.)

TUTOR: Did you have fun playing?

STUDENT: (Nods slightly but does not initiate any conversation.)

TUTOR: Tell me what happened during play time.

STUDENT: (Sits quietly and remains completely silent, failing to respond to the general question about the play session.)

task.content: Discussing the play that occurred in the preceding component
task.learning_goal: Reflecting on the social interaction and verbalizing what was played with and what exchanges occurred

context.environment: Play area immediately following the play session
context.materials: Toys used during the preceding play session

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When the interventionist asked the children a general question about what they played with during the play session
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: The general question did not elicit a response from the children

behavior_patterns.condition: When expected to recall and articulate past events without specific prompts
behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Demonstrated fewer social skills (e.g., initiating conversations with peers)
